project.component: { "keyToString": { ".NET Launch Settings Profile.Volterp.Api: http.executor": "Debug", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "XThreadsFramesViewSplitterKey": "0.49019608", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "com.intellij.ml.llm.matterhorn.ej.ui.settings.DefaultModelSelectionForGA.v1": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "feature/mapflow", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "ml.llm.AcpAgentsConfigurable", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }
